grant_title: USDA Community Facility Loan and Grant Program
geographic_restrictions: Rural areas in the US Northeast (including New Hampshire) with populations of 20,000 or less, with priority for small communities (≤5,500) and low-income areas (median household income <80% of state nonmetropolitan median).
project_area: Solid waste infrastructure, including recycling equipment (e.g., balers, scales, storage containers, glass crushers), safety equipment, signage, bathroom facilities at transfer stations, computers, and cameras for transfer station use.
demographic_requirements: Priority given to small communities (≤5,500 residents) and low-income areas (median household income <80% of state nonmetropolitan median household income).
eligibility_summary: Open to municipalities, transfer stations, and recycling groups in rural areas of the US Northeast with populations ≤20,000. Matching grants up to $50,000 based on population and median household income. Applications accepted year-round.
